course_description.overview: Road cycling sportive event part of the L'Étape Series, held near the Mandalika MotoGP circuit on Lombok island, featuring approximately 140 km of riding through coastal and scenic terrain.[5]

key_segments.name: Mandalika Circuit Area
key_segments.description: Start/finish near the Pertamina Mandalika Circuit with coastal views and public roads integrated into the route.

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Regional sportive with tropical island scenery; specific climbs and challenges not detailed in available sources.

logistics.getting_there: Fly to Lombok International Airport from Bali (30 min), Jakarta (2 hrs), Singapore, or Malaysia; taxis, private pickups, car rentals, or ferries from Bali available.[2]
logistics.accommodation: Hotels near Mandalika with parking; combine with Bali holiday.[2]
logistics.registration_details: Details not yet available; date listed as unconfirmed.[5]
logistics.bike_logistics: Standard road bike event; transport via flights or ferries.
logistics.local_considerations: Tropical climate, pristine beaches, lush landscapes; expect vibrant culture and potential rain on special asphalt roads nearby.[1][7]

final_verdict.one_liner: Scenic road sportive in paradise-like Lombok near MotoGP circuit.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Cyclists seeking tropical adventure and L'Étape prestige in Indonesia.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes for unique island cycling experience.
pro_tips: Fly from Bali for easy access.
Prepare for tropical heat and humidity.
Combine with MotoGP weekend if dates align.
Book early as regional events fill up.
